baseline.reason: Misidentifies root cause: claims linesize/width mismatch causes OOB, but the actual fix (good.c) adds height guards `if (h > 1)`, `if (h > 2)`, `if (h > 3)` around the edge-row memcpy calls. The vulnerability is unconditional memcpy for 4 edge rows when h < 4, not linesize vs width mismatch.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies root cause: 4 unconditional memcpy(dst, src, w) calls at lines 460-461 and 491-492 write past buffer when h < 4. Correctly traces trigger path from plane->height through gaussian_blur parameters to the unbounded memcpy operations. The fix (good.c) confirms this by adding height checks to guard each edge-row memcpy.
